headlines.title: Rep. Mike Collins wins GOP runoff in Georgia Senate race
headlines.description: NBC News projects Collins will face Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff in one of the most competitive Senate races this year.

headlines.title: Trump cancels Jay Clayton’s confirmation hearing for national intelligence director
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said Wednesday that he was delaying Jay Clayton’s nomination to lead the U.S. intelligence community, citing his frustration over a lapsed surveillance tool and a voter ID bill that currently lacks enough support for passage

headlines.title: Trump faces Supreme Court showdown as major rulings loom
headlines.description: The Supreme Court is set to issue key rulings, including on Trump’s effort to curb birthright citizenship and fire a member of the Federal Reserve.

headlines.title: Democratic socialist Janeese Lewis George opens up lead in Washington, D.C., mayoral primary
headlines.description: Lewis George, a member of the City Council, has a significant edge over her nearest rival, Kenyan McDuffie, with about two-thirds of the vote counted and the race too early to call.

headlines.title: Sen. Aisha Wahab project to move to runoff in race to replace Swalwell
headlines.description: State Sen. Aisha Wahab is projected to advance in the special election in California’s House District 14 and will face another opponent in the fall. Rep. Eric Swalwell vacated the seat after resigning amid allegations of sexual assault.

headlines.title: Rep. Barry Moore speaks on Trump’s support after projected GOP Alabama Senate runoff win
headlines.description: Rep. Barry Moore addresses President Trump’s endorsement after his projected win over former Navy SEAL Jared Hudson in the Republican primary runoff for Alabama Senate. Moore described Trump as the “greatest president” in his lifetime.

headlines.title: Rep. Barry Moore projected winner in Alabama GOP Senate primary
headlines.description: NBC News projects that Trump-backed Rep. Barry Moore has defeated former Navy SEAL Jared Hudson In the Republican Senate primary runoff race in Alabama. NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down the numbers in the race.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Billionaire Rick Jackson defeats Trump-backed candidate in Georgia governor’s primary
headlines.description: NBC News projects Jackson has won the primary runoff and will move on to the general election in the battleground state against Democrat Keisha Lance Bottoms.

headlines.title: Trump-endorsed Rep. Barry Moore wins GOP primary runoff in Alabama Senate race
headlines.description: NBC News projects Moore defeated former Navy SEAL Jared Hudson to advance to the general election to succeed Sen. Tommy Tuberville.

headlines.title: Mike Mazzei and Gentner Drummond advance to GOP runoff in Oklahoma governor contest
headlines.description: No candidate got a majority of the vote in the primary, NBC News projects, as Republicans compete to succeed term-limited Gov. Kevin Stitt.
